backlog_cursor.description: Third run on 2026-02-22. Processed #671, #702, #748, #793, #857 for labelling. Next run should continue from ~#858.

970.description: Provided API migration guidance for Literate.FormatLiterateNodes to WriteHtml/ToHtml

notes: Repo has 85+ open issues spanning from #72 (2013) to #974 (2026-02-22)

8 open PRs: #965 (emoji fix), #932 (signature API WIP), #925 (watch mode fix), #890 (netstandard2.0), #884 (dependabot NUnit), #880 (dependabot CodeAnalysis), #875 (fsdocs init), #776 (node_modules ignore)

Repo labels: meta-discuss, meta-review, status-consider, status-planned, status-priority, type-bug, type-docs, type-feature, type-proposal, type-tests, action-taken, up-for-grabs, help-wanted, good-first-issue, dependencies, github_actions, .NET
PR #776 (node_modules) has no reviews - blocked on maintainer
PR #925 (watch mode) has CHANGES_REQUESTED from nojaf - active discussion through Jul 2024
Issues #536, #573, #585, #586, #590, #591, #592, #605, #626 all by dsyme with 0-1 comments - known desired enhancements
Issues #551 and #592 are actionable bugs that need community attention
safeoutputs add_labels only allows: bug, enhancement, help wanted, good first issue, spam, off topic
The repo uses custom labels (type-bug, type-feature, etc.) but standard GitHub labels (bug, enhancement, help wanted) also work
Issue #974 is an announcement from dsyme explaining Repo Assist was added via gh aw add
Many issues in range #671-#972 are unlabelled - priority for future label runs
Issues labelled as bugs in this run: #671 (template keywords), #702 (5D/6D arrays), #748 (backtick XML docs), #793 (--projects relative paths), #857 (CSharp library not used)
Next run should continue labelling from ~#858 onwards
